headline: Operations become intelligence.
lead: Sidón connects what people do, what systems detect, and what the operation needs to understand.
introMeta: A connected solution for understanding and improving daily operations.
categoriesLead: Each category addresses a distinct operational need. Together, they create a shared view of the operation while allowing each project to use only the modules it needs.
categoryInstructions: Five-category Sidón carousel. Use the arrow keys or buttons to change categories. Activate a card to view its modules.
connectedTitle: Each module addresses a specific need. Sidón connects them within one operation.
connectedLead: A project can begin with one module, one category, or a combination designed around its operational reality.
dumaLead: Duma AI is Sidón’s intelligence layer. It connects information across its modules to explain what is happening, prioritize what matters, recommend actions, and support better decisions.
dumaStatement: Sidón connects the operation. Duma AI understands it.
dumaActionLabel: Meet Duma AI, Sidón’s intelligence layer
conversationTitle: Talk to us about your operation
conversationLead: We can begin with one module, one category, Duma AI, or an operational need that does not yet have a name.
conversationAction: Talk to us about your operation

mantenimiento-seguridad.name: Maintenance and Safety
mantenimiento-seguridad.headline: Keep assets available. Keep incidents under control.
mantenimiento-seguridad.intro: Mantiz keeps maintenance work organized and traceable. Talos structures incident management and ensures every case receives the attention required for resolution.
mantenimiento-seguridad.solves: It brings structure to two essential operational responsibilities: keeping assets available and ensuring every incident receives attention, follow-up, and a documented resolution.

mantiz.name: Mantiz
mantiz.description: Organizes preventive and corrective maintenance with asset records, work orders, assigned responsibility, service history, and field execution.

talos.name: Talos
talos.description: Manages incidents with reporting, containment, cause analysis, corrective actions, evidence, and escalation based on severity.

auditorias.name: Audits
auditorias.headline: Execution should be verifiable.
auditorias.intro: Verifies standards, detects deviations, and preserves reliable operational evidence.
auditorias.solves: Shows whether an activity, condition, or round was completed correctly and preserves evidence for follow-up.

smartAudits.name: Smart Audits
smartAudits.description: Photo-based audits with capture validation and Duma-assisted analysis.

argos.name: Argos
argos.description: Duma analyzes live video to detect configured conditions and preserve evidence.

nodIa.name: NOD-IA
nodIa.description: Uses AI to detect product gaps across shelves, displays, refrigerators, and other merchandising spaces.

rondines.name: Rondines
rondines.description: Verifies security rounds with QR codes, geolocation, and photo evidence.

personas.name: People
personas.headline: People cared for. Teams prepared.
personas.intro: Supports each person’s wellbeing and prepares them to participate in the operation with confidence.
personas.solves: People cannot do their best work without the care they need and the preparation their role requires.

wellness.name: Wellness
wellness.description: Organizes and manages medical appointments and occupational medical records to support each person’s wellbeing with privacy and continuity.

byblos.name: Byblos
byblos.description: Delivers training and certifications through interactive, game-like experiences tailored to each role.

acceso.name: Access
acceso.headline: The right person. The right access.
acceso.intro: Organizes and validates access for visitors, employees, contractors, suppliers, and vehicles.
acceso.solves: A door does not control access on its own. The operation needs to know who may enter, confirm that all requirements are met, and preserve evidence of every entry.

axessOne.name: AxessOne
axessOne.description: Unifies preregistration, document validation, permissions, and access control for people and vehicles.

monitoreo.name: Monitoring
monitoreo.headline: See what matters. Act in time.
monitoreo.intro: Monitors assets, processes, and conditions with continuous data, alerts, and connected action.
monitoreo.solves: When conditions change unnoticed, the operation reacts too late.

sense.name: Sense
sense.description: Monitors variables, generates alerts, and enables action across connected equipment.

polar.name: Polar
polar.description: Monitors and certifies transport conditions through temperature, location, and door-status records.

industrial.name: Industrial
industrial.description: An OEE platform that connects PLCs, meters, equipment, and process variables to measure availability, performance, and quality.
